story.title: Our Story
story.content: Founded with a vision to bridge the gap between online and offline shopping experiences, Thridify empowers e-commerce brands to create immersive product experiences without coding expertise.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.mission: To democratize 3D and AR technology for e-commerce, making immersive product experiences accessible to businesses of all sizes.
mission.vision: A world where every online shopper can touch, feel, and experience products before they buy.
